name: cursor-autoresearch
description: Autonomous experiment loop for Cursor — port of pi-autoresearch

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @cursor-autoresearch/core exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @cursor-autoresearch/mcp-server exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter autoresearch exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cursor-autoresearch/core build && pnpm --filter @cursor-autoresearch/mcp-server build && pnpm --filter autoresearch run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @cursor-autoresearch/core test && pnpm --filter @cursor-autoresearch/mcp-server test && pnpm --filter autoresearch test
scripts.package:extension: pnpm build && pnpm --filter autoresearch exec vsce package --no-dependencies
